notes: MINIMAL structural placeholder seeded at Author. rm-studio is the end-to-end ORCHESTRATOR: it routes a brief to its JTBD front-end and walks concept->script->storyboard->voiceover->build->validate->render->preview, running each rm-* skill's scripts and reading their numbered artifacts (it does NOT re-implement them). Charter refines these into full media-judge evals (vision-grade the rendered frames + JTBD coverage); for now just assert the orchestrator's structural contract — every phase artifact lands at its artifacts/<project>/ path and validate gates the render. No hand-coded regex test logic here.

expectations.desc: SKILL.md has valid frontmatter (name: rm-studio; metadata.author=sl8, version, inputs[], outputs[]) and a body '## Outputs' section that restates every outputs.path (anti-hallucination gate).

After an end-to-end run, every phase artifact exists at its declared path under artifacts/<project>/: 01-concept.md, 02-script.md, 03-storyboard.md, 04-timing.json, remotion-project/, 05-validation.md, exports/<name>-<ar>.mp4, and 06-summary.md.
rm-validate reported PASS (05-validation.md present with a pass verdict) BEFORE any exports/*.mp4 exists — no unvalidated render; run.sh exits non-zero on a blocked gate and never calls render.
06-summary.md records the resolved parameters (voice, style/concept, palette hex, ARs, quality, music) and any fallback taken; confirms keyless+local render (no cloud/Lambda/auth).
